hero.title: Design interactive narratives without losing control of the world.
hero.desc: Storyarn connects sheets, dialogue, scenes, localization, and export so every narrative decision lives in one traceable project.

features.title: A production base for narrative teams.
features.desc: Centralize structure, writing, testing, and delivery so the team does not depend on spreadsheets, loose diagrams, or internal scripts.

discover.title: Everything important is referenced, not copied.
discover.desc: Storyarn works as a source of truth: define the world once and reuse it across dialogue, scenes, conditions, localization, and exporters.

sheets.title: Sheets structure characters, places, and factions.
sheets.desc: Fields, blocks, inheritance, and variables keep your world consistent even as the project grows.

flows.title: Visual flows for dialogue and narrative logic.
flows.desc: Combine lines, conditions, instructions, sequences, and subflows without separating writing from behavior.

localization.title: Localization connected to real content.
localization.desc: Extract lines, measure progress, work with glossaries, and keep translation close to narrative context.

production.label: Production ready
production.title: Test, localize, and export without rebuilding your narrative.
production.desc: The goal is not only writing better: it is reaching the engine with clean data, recoverable versions, and less manual work.
items: Debug and player modes verify branches before integration.
Snapshots and comparisons audit narrative changes.
Exporters for Yarn Spinner, Ink, Godot Dialogic, Unity, and Unreal.
production.image_alt: Veilbreak localization dashboard with language progress and pending texts

hero.description: The narrative design platform where characters, dialogues, worlds, and localization live in a single connected project — from the first draft to native engine export.

features.section_subtitle: A suite of tools where writers create, analysts explore, and programmers simply export. Everything connected.

core.title: The Core Tools
core.desc: The heart of your narrative. Structured documents, dynamic branching, and interactive worlds designed to integrate as your single source of truth.

analytics.title: Analytics and Dashboards
analytics.desc: Monitor your project's complexity. Visualize dependencies, dialogue density, and technical blind spots in your narrative structure at a glance.

debugging.title: Multi-level Debugging
debugging.desc: Experience the story exactly as a player would or analyze it step-by-step by tracking every variable, condition, and trigger in real time.

vcs.title: Version Control
vcs.desc: Complete history of your narrative. Compare branches, audit changes between writers, and roll back in time without fear of breaking the game flow.

localization.title: Smart Localization
localization.desc: Extract lines, translate smartly, manage glossaries, and visualize coverage metrics by language — all from the writing canvas itself.

export.title: Native Export
export.desc: Automatically export to established engines like Godot Dialogic, Unity, Unreal, Ink, or Yarn Spinner. Your data, ready to enter production.

sheets.label: Sheets
sheets.title: Inheritance keeps your world consistent
sheets.desc: Parent and child sheets let you develop characters, factions, and places without constantly duplicating structures.
items: Shared variables flowing down the hierarchy.
Override only what changes — per variant or episode.
Scale the world without copy and paste.

flows.label: Flows
flows.title: Clean visual graphs at production scale
flows.desc: Dialogues, conditions, instructions, and branches in a single integrated graph — designed to remain clear even at maximum scale.
items: Conversations, state changes, and unified exits.
Logic lives linked to your sheets, not in orphaned snippets.
From quick sketches to hyper-complex graphs.

scenes.label: Scenes
scenes.title: Layers and fog for readable maps
scenes.desc: Use layers to plan progressions, visibility, and structures without flattening everything into a single saturated image.
items: Layer visibility instead of a chaotic canvas.
Fog of war to communicate progression.
Large spaces remain iterable and readable in review.

exploration.title: Walk through your world before it ships
exploration.desc: Scene exploration mode lets you experience the world as a player — navigate layers, trigger events, and test spatial logic without leaving the editor.
items: Move through scenes as if playing the game
Trigger zone events and transitions in real time
Validate spatial design before engine integration

version.title: Every change, always recoverable
version.desc: Automatic version snapshots mean you can always go back. Compare any two versions side by side.
items: Side-by-side visual diff for any version
Restore any previous state in one click

workflow.title: From first draft to engine-ready
workflow.subtitle: Storyarn follows your natural workflow — define, write, test, export.

define.title: Define the world
define.desc: Structure characters, locations, items, and factions in sheets with variables, formulas, and inheritance.

write.title: Write and branch
write.desc: Build dialogue flows with conditions, instructions, and branching — all connected to your project data.

explore.title: Explore and debug
explore.desc: Play through flows, walk through scenes, and step-debug every variable and condition.

export.title: Localize and export
export.desc: Extract lines, translate, and export to Yarn Spinner, Ink, Godot Dialogic, Unity, or Unreal.

cta.title: Start building your next narrative
cta.desc: We are onboarding a small group of narrative designers and game studios. Join the waitlist — we'll contact you when your slot becomes available.
cta.success: You're on the list. We'll reach out when your spot is ready.
cta.error: We couldn't submit this. Try again.
cta.footer: No spam. We'll only write when the time comes.

footer.tagline: Design characters, dialogues, worlds, and localization in a single connected project. Built for narrative teams shipping interactive stories.
